title: Youtube Poop: Kay-Chee is a Flip Flopper! =O
description:
Since you all threatened me so nicely, here's that Higurashi poop I promised!

This was a lot harder to poop than I thought.  I tried to use less sex puns and use some other brands of humor.  I've done a lot of things in this poop I've never done before, but hey, no risk no reward right?  The first minute or so was inspired by molhal and Fagottron. Special thanks to Misselaneous10 for helping me turn the headquarters for defense into a KFC!

I might make this a two-parter.  It all depends on what you guys think.

And yes, I am working on an MP3.
